requests.prompt: App Store screenshot for a wellness alarm app. iPhone 6.5 inch (1290x2796) vertical. Background cream (#FAF7F2). Center: stylized phone screen mockup showing 4 colorful horizontal cards stacked vertically: a teal/blue card with a meditation emoji 'Body', a purple card 'Mind', an orange card 'Brain', a yellow card 'Creative' — each in a soft pastel tone. Above the phone, large bold sans-serif headline: 'Four themes.' Below the phone, smaller text: '1,000 rituals.' Bottom corner: 'Morning Ritual' wordmark. Aesthetic: clean, calm, premium wellness, warm color palette with playful pops. Typography is large and confident.
